sentences.arabic: عِنْدَ التَّجَوُّلِ فِي الْأَزِقَّةِ الضَّيِّقَةِ لِلْأَسْوَاقِ الْقَدِيمَةِ، يَأْسِرُكَ عَبِيقُ التَّوَابِلِ الْفَوَّاحِ الَّذِي يَمْلأُ الْأَرْجَاءَ.
sentences.translation: Prilikom šetnje uskim uličicama starih tržnica, opčiniće vas miris začina koji se širi i ispunjava prostor.
sentences.translationEn: When wandering through the narrow alleys of ancient markets, you are captivated by the fragrant aroma of spices that fills the surroundings.

sentences.arabic: تُمَثِّلُ هَذِهِ الْأَسْوَاقُ، الَّتِي ازْدَهَرَتْ لِقُرُونٍ طَوِيلَةٍ، الْقَلْبَ النَّابِضَ لِلتِّجَارَةِ الْمَحَلِّيَّةِ وَالْحَيَاةِ الْيَوْمِيَّةِ لِلسُّكَّانِ.
sentences.translation: Ove tržnice, koje su cvjetale dugim vijekovima, predstavljaju kucajuće srce lokalne trgovine i svakodnevnog života stanovnika.
sentences.translationEn: These markets, which have flourished for long centuries, represent the beating heart of local trade and the daily life of the inhabitants.

sentences.arabic: يُرَصُّ الزَّعْفَرَانُ وَالْكَمُّونُ وَالْهَيْلُ بِعِنَايَةٍ فَائِقَةٍ فِي أَكْوَامٍ مُلَوَّنَةٍ تَجْذِبُ أَنْظَارَ الْمَارَّةِ وَتُحَفِّزُ حَوَاسَّهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Šafran, kumin i kardamom pažljivo su složeni u šarene hrpe koje privlače poglede prolaznika i stimulišu njihova čula.
sentences.translationEn: Saffron, cumin, and cardamom are meticulously arranged in colorful mounds that attract the eyes of passersby and stimulate their senses.

sentences.arabic: وَلَوْ اسْتَفْسَرْتَ عَنْ مَصَادِرِ هَذِهِ الْمَكَوِّنَاتِ، لَسَرَدَ لَكَ التَّاجِرُ حِكَايَاتٍ مُشَوِّقَةً عَنْ طُرُقِ الْقَوَافِلِ التَّارِيخِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada biste se raspitali o izvorima ovih sastojaka, trgovac bi vam ispričao zanimljive priče o historijskim putevima karavana.
sentences.translationEn: If you were to inquire about the sources of these ingredients, the merchant would narrate exciting tales of historical caravan routes to you.

sentences.arabic: فَالْبُهَارَاتُ لَيْسَتْ مُجَرَّدَ إِضَافَاتٍ لِلنَّكْهَةِ، بَلْ هِيَ جَوْهَرُ التَّارِيخِ الْغِذَائِيِّ وَالثَّقَافِيِّ لِلْمِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Začini nisu samo dodaci za ukus, već su oni suština prehrambene i kulturne historije ove regije.
sentences.translationEn: For spices are not mere additions for flavor, but rather they are the essence of the region's nutritional and cultural history.
